LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF LINDA NUGENT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO GIVE SUFFICIENT NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1005(B) BASED ON HER PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON APRIL 12, 2013. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO GIVE 16 COURT DAYS PLUS AN ADDITIONAL 5 CALENDAR DAYS FOR SERVICE BY MAIL. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-08-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LINDA NUGENT's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is denied. Plaintiff failed to give sufficient notice pursuant to CCP 1005(b) based on her proof of service by mail on April 12, 2013. Plaintiff is required to give 16 court days plus an additional 5 calendar days for service by mail. Judge: Peter J. Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
